studies.title: Randomized-controlled trial investigating the effectiveness of a digital life-style intervention to improve quality of life in people with multiple sclerosis.
studies.brief_summary: Non-pharmacological therapies show their benefit in the treatment of MS and represent a noteworthy therapeutic alternative or a complement to treatment with drugs. The presented study aims to investigate the effectiveness of the online program levidex for therapeutic support and behaviour modification among adult patients with multiple scleroris (MS).
